findings.title: Documented package script does not exist

evidence.claim: README.md says to run `npm run test:e2e`.
evidence.currentFact: package.json defines scripts `dev` and `test`, but not `test:e2e`.

findings.suggestedAction: Update the README command or add a `test:e2e` script to package.json.

findings.title: Documented relative file path does not exist

evidence.currentFact: `docs/cli.md` is not present in the fixture file tree.

findings.suggestedAction: Create docs/cli.md or remove the stale link from README.md.
